rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §22.08361 governs criminal history reviews for private school employees. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operational interaction.
quote: Sec. 22.08361. NATIONAL CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORD INFORMATION REVIEW OF CERTAIN PRIVATE SCHOOL EMPLOYEES.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an unrelated subject area (criminal background checks for private school employees) and contains no reference to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal.
